hero.sub: Pick your islands, stack your nights, collect the moments you'll never stop talking about.

s1.heading: How do you want to wake up?
s1.sub: Two very different mornings. Both absolutely perfect.

pkg.local_desc: Family-run guesthouses on real, breathing islands. Authentic food, warm people, and zero pretension.
pkg.resort_desc: One island. One resort. Overwater villas, sunrise yoga, and a butler who knows your name.

fp.honeymoon_tagline: For the chapter that changes everything.
fp.family_tagline: The trip they'll talk about forever.
fp.surf_tagline: Just you, the board, and perfect left-handers.

s2.heading: When are you going?
s2.subMobile: Dry (Nov–Apr): calm & sunny · Wet (May–Oct): wilder, mantas, fewer crowds
s2.subDesktop: Dry season (Nov—Apr) = calm seas and blazing skies. Wet season (May—Oct) = fewer crowds, manta rays, and moody magic.

s3.heading: Where do you want to stay?
s3.subDesktop: Browse and pick your properties — each one is a different world. Mix and match across islands.
s3.tooMany: You've picked {{selected}} properties but only have {{nights}} nights. Deselect one, or go back and add more nights.

s4.heading: How long at each island?
s4.subDesktop: Move fast or linger slow — {{nights}} nights, {{count}} {{islandWord}}. Your call.

s5.heading: What memories are you collecting?
s5.sub: Sunrise dives, manta rays at dusk, a private dinner on the sand — showing everything available in

modal.heading: Let's make this real

modal.referenceNote: Keep this reference for all future correspondence.
modal.noPayment: No payment now. We confirm availability and send a final quote within 24 hours.
